title: A clip for car seat cover
abstract: The present invention relates to a clip (10) for fastening a car seat cover onto a car seat, characterised by: a head means (11) comprising a U-shaped holder (11a) with a gripping means (11b) at each end to receive and grasp a car seat cover; and an insertion element (13) having a tip end, connected to the head means (11) via a midpoint element (12), to be embedded in the car seat for fastening the car seat cover.
claims: Claims Claims  I/We claim: 1 . A clip (10) for fastening a car seat cover onto a car seat, characterised by: a head means (1 1 ) comprising a U-shaped holder (1 1 a) with a gripping means (1 1 b) at each end to receive and grasp a car seat cover; and an insertion element (13) having a tip end, connected to the head means (1 1 ) via a midpoint element (12), to be embedded in the car seat for fastening the car seat cover.
